mainEntity.name: Cost of hiring AI visibility experts for LA law firms?
mainEntity.text: Cost of hiring AI visibility experts for LA law firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI visibility services for LA firms range $2,000-$10,000 initially for audits/schema/directories, plus $500-$2,000/month retainers, depending on firm size and markets.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Basic packages cover directory claims ($1k-3k), advanced include schema/custom content ($5k+). LA high-cost; ROI via 1-2 referrals. DIY cheaper but slower. Beware vendors overpromising—vet via case studies. Insurers may view as marketing expense, not deductible fully.[3]

name: Pricing AI Visibility Services for LA Firms
